node.html:
• Core Mission: Built a unified AI Proxy Gateway and Cost Management Dashboard to solve the "black box" of AI billing across 15+ providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini.
  • Unified Proxy: Developed a secure gateway allowing teams to use a single "FluxBill Key" (fb_...) for all AI integrations, enabling instant model fallback and smart routing.
  • Smart Model Routing: Implemented autonomous request routing to the most cost-effective models (e.g., GPT-4 to GPT-4o-mini), saving users an average of 31% on monthly AI spend.
  • Feature-Level Attribution: Engineered custom headers (x-fluxbill-feature) to track specific app features (Chatbots, Voice Agents, etc.), providing unprecedented visibility into granular costs.
  • Technical Stack: Architected using Next.js 15 (App Router), Tailwind CSS, and Supabase (PostgreSQL) with Row Level Security (RLS) for multi-tenant isolation.
  • Financial Reporting: Automated plain-English PDF reports for stakeholders, translating complex token metrics into clear, finance-ready business insights.

• Pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science with a strong focus on real-world software products.
  • Established a strong foundation in Data Structures, Algorithms, and Object-Oriented Programming.
  • Active in building practical, scalable applications and exploring the startup ecosystem.
  • Focused on SaaS development and full-stack engineering.
